view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the generation of payment links for participants.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Deposit collection vs full payment', but the evidence does not provide clarity on whether payment links were generated for each participant. While there are multiple bookings confirmed, the lack of evidence specifically addressing the generation of payment links leads to an inconclusive status. The prior steps do not cover this critical aspect, resulting in a gap in fulfilling the requirement.
